examples: The Harrier should, in fact, be a smaller version of the English Foxhound.
They tell me that if the fox would remain in the bosom of the frozen earth he would be safe, or if be would run in a straight line away no foxhound could overtake him;
If a foxhound were to tear at a fox without killing it, the dog would be badly bitten.
What actually happens is that the first foxhound to reach a fox kills it by breaking its neck.
The star was driven around the camp in a Foxhound vehicle by Warrant Officer Class 1 Rob Ingham.
